'''Jiir''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and was the older brother of [[Basso]]. They were both in the [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] resistance, just prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. When [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] was on a mercy mission on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]], the resistance created a diversion to let Basso get through the local stormtroopers, so he could inform Leia of the Imperial presence on Ralltiir. After creating a diversion, Jiir was shot and [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]].

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 5|''Empire'' 5]] {{1st}}
